---
title: "pedigreekit 功能测试"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## 读取测试数据

```{r}
library(pedigreekit)
ped <- read.csv("ped.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
str(ped)

progeny <- ped$ID
sire <- ped$DadID
dam <- ped$MaID
```

## 基础 check_pedigree（向量输入）

```{r}
res_vec <- check_pedigree(
  progeny = progeny,
  sire = sire,
  dam = dam,
  missing = c("0", "na", "NA", "", " ")
)
str(res_vec)
```

## check_pedigree（data.frame 输入，列名为 progeny/sire/dam）

```{r}
ped2 <- data.frame(
  progeny = progeny,
  sire = sire,
  dam = dam,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
res_df <- check_pedigree(ped2)
str(res_df)
```

## check_pedigree（file 输入，逗号分隔）

```{r}
res_file <- check_pedigree(
  file = "ped.csv",
  sep = ",",
  progeny = "ID",
  sire = "DadID",
  dam = "MaID"
)
str(res_file)
```

## fix_pedigree（向量输入）

```{r}
ped_fixed <- fix_pedigree(
  progeny = progeny,
  sire = sire,
  dam = dam
)
str(ped_fixed)
```

## fix_pedigree（file 输入）

```{r}
ped_fixed_file <- fix_pedigree(
  file = "ped.csv",
  sep = ",",
  progeny = "ID",
  sire = "DadID",
  dam = "MaID"
)
str(ped_fixed_file)
write.csv(ped_fixed_file, "ped_fixed.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
